testcase.name: test_password_no_uppercase_returns_400
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter106_partner_signup_signin.py:388: in test_password_no_uppercase_returns_400 assert resp.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 429: {"detail": "Rate limit exceeded. Please slow down and try again."} E assert 429 == 400 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
